content.full_text:
January 10, 1990

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Jeanne:

This is a request for written advice pursuant to Government Code Section 83114(b). The advice we seek is written confirmation that our client, the National Rifle Association (the "NRA") and its political action committee, the National Rifle Association Victory Fund (the "Fund"), should report certain payments in connection with its communications to members in the manner you have directed.

As we understand it, it is the Commission's advice that payments actually made by the NRA or an arm thereof to fund partisan communications to members in connection with California elections should be reported as contributions received and expenditures made by the Fund. It is our understanding that the attached 1988 supplemental independent expenditure reports and the attached amendments to the Fund's 1988 campaign statements disclose such payments in the manner required by the Commission. We seek your confirmation that by reporting payments in connection with such communications in this manner, our client henceforth will be in full compliance with the reporting and disclosure obligations imposed by the Political Reform Act of 1974 insofar as such payments are concerned.

Very truly yours,

Frederick K. Lowell

Attach.
